children.name: hwOspfv3AreaAggregateTable
children.description:
A range of IPv6 prefixes specified by a 
                prefix/prefix length pair. Note that if 
                ranges are configured such that one range 
                subsumes another range the most specific 
                match is the preferred one.

children.name: hwOspfv3NbrTable
children.description: A table of non-virtual neighbor information.

children.name: hwOspfv3VirtIfTable
children.description:
Information about this router's virtual 
                interfaces.

children.name: hwOspfv3IfTable
children.description:
The OSPFv3 Interface Table describes the  
                interfaces from the viewpoint of OSPFv3.

children.name: hwOspfv3IfEntry
children.description:
The OSPFv3 Interface Entry describes one 
                interface from the viewpoint of OSPFv3.

children.name: hwOspfv3CfgNbrTable
children.description:
A table of configured, non-virtual neighbor 
                information.

children.name: hwOspfv3CfgNbrEntry
children.description:
The information regarding a single configured 
                neighbor or neighbor discovered by lower-level 
                protocols such as Inverse Neighbor Discovery.

children.name: hwOspfv3LinkLsdbTable
children.description: The OSPFv3 Process's Link-Scope Link State Database.

children.name: hwOspfv3VirtNbrTable
children.description: A table of virtual neighbor information.

children.name: hwOspfv3AreaTable
children.description:
Information describing the configured  
                parameters and cumulative statistics of the router's 
                attached areas.

children.name: hwOspfv3PeerFlappingSuppressStatus
children.description:
his object indicates the mode of the OSPFv3 neighbor relationship flapping suppression.
none(1): OSPFv3 neighbor relationship flapping suppression is not started yet.
holddown(2): OSPFv3 neighbor relationship flapping suppression works in Hold-down mode.
holdmaxcost(3): OSPFv3 neighbor relationship flapping suppression works in Hold-max-cost mode.

children.name: hwOspfv3LsaId
children.description: A 32-bit integer uniquely identifies an area. LSA-ID 0.0.0.0 is used for the OSPF LSA.

children.name: hwOspfv3PurgeHostName1
children.description: This object indicates the name of an OSPFv3 router which maybe purge OSPFv3 routes.

children.name: hwOspfv3ProcessId
children.description: The process ID indicates the OSPFv3 process number. The value ranges from 1 to 4294967295.

children.name: hwOspfv3NewRouterId
children.description:
A 32-bit integer uniquely identifying the 
                router in the Autonomous System. To ensure 
                uniqueness, this may default to the value of 
                one of the router's IPv4 host addresses, 
                represented as a 32-bit unsigned integer, 
                if IPv4 is configured on the router.

children.name: hwOspfv3LoopDetectProtocolAttr
children.description: This object indicates the protocol attribute of the OSPFv3 import route loop detect.

children.name: hwOspfv3CostAdjustReason
children.description: This object indicates the reason why OSPFv3 adjusts the link cost.

children.name: hwOspfv3LoopDetectRedistributeID1
children.description: This object indicates the redis-list router id and process id of the OSPFv3 import route loop detect.

children.name: hwOspfv3IfName
children.description: The interface name

children.name: hwOspfv3PurgeIpAddress1
children.description: This object indicates the IP address of an OSPFv3 router which maybe purge OSPFv3 routes.

children.name: hwOspfv3NbrThresholdUpper
children.description: This object indicates the upper alarm threshold for the number of neighbors.

children.name: hwOspfv3ConfigErrorType
children.description:
Potential types of configuration conflicts. 
           Used by the ospfv3ConfigError and  
           ospfv3ConfigVirtError notifications. When the last value 
           of a notification using this object is needed, but no 
           notifications of that type have been sent, this value 
           pertaining to this object should be returned as 
           noError

children.name: hwOspfv3PacketType
children.description:
OSPFv3 packet types. When the last value of a notification 
           using this object is needed, but no notifications of 
           that type have been sent, the value pertaining 
           to this object should be returned as nullPacket

children.name: hwOspfv3FlushLsaNum
children.description: This object indicates the number of LSAs deleted by the local device or another device.

children.name: hwOspfv3PurgeIpAddress3
children.description: This object indicates the IP address of an OSPFv3 router which maybe purge OSPFv3 routes.

children.name: hwOspfv3AffectedNodeNum
children.description: This object indicates the number of affected node when OSPFv3 routes were deleted.

children.name: hwOspfv3PeerFlappingSuppressReason
children.description: The reason of peer flapping suppress status change.

children.name: hwOspfv3PurgeRouterId2
children.description: This object indicates the 32-bit integer that uniquely identifies the router in the Autonomous System.

children.name: hwOspfv3TotalNodeNum
children.description: This object indicates the total number of node in the System.

children.name: hwOspfv3PurgeRouterId
children.description: This object indicates the 32-bit integer that uniquely identifies the router in the Autonomous System.

children.name: hwOspfv3LsaAge
children.description: This age of the ospf lsa.

children.name: hwOspfv3LoopDetectType
children.description: This object indicates the type of the OSPFv3 import route loop detect.

children.name: hwOspfv3PurgeHostName3
children.description: This object indicates the name of an OSPFv3 router which maybe purge OSPFv3 routes.

children.name: hwOspfv3PurgeRouterId1
children.description: This object indicates the 32-bit integer that uniquely identifies the router in the Autonomous System.

children.name: hwOspfv3PurgeRouterId3
children.description: This object indicates the 32-bit integer that uniquely identifies the router in the Autonomous System.

children.name: hwOspfv3PurgeHostName
children.description: This object indicates the name of an OSPFv3 router which purge OSPFv3 routes.

children.name: hwOspfv3AdjustedCost
children.description: This object indicates Link cost of the current event that triggers OSPFv3 adjustment.

children.name: hwOspfv3AsLsdbTable
children.description: The OSPFv3 Process's AS-Scope Link State Database.
